definitions: Small freshwater bivalve mollusks (Dreissena polymorpha) native to Eurasia, known for being a highly invasive species in North America.
Invasive mussels characterized by a striped pattern on their shells that attach to solid surfaces in large clusters.
examples: Zebra mussels clogged the intake pipes.
The lake is infested with zebra mussels.
Boats must be cleaned to prevent spreading zebra mussels.
